ast_check.command: python3 -c 'import ast; ast.parse(...)' for all src/*.py files

nonBlockingIssues.description: schema.sql does not include source_tool in the messages CREATE TABLE definition. Fresh databases rely on migrate_schema() to add this column. The current architecture handles this (get_conn calls migrate_schema), but schema.sql is drifting from the actual schema.
derive_project() inconsistency: existing check uses p.endswith('projects') (broad match) but new check uses p == 'sessions' (exact match). Actually safer but asymmetric.
parse_codex_history() uses datetime.fromtimestamp(ts) producing local-timezone timestamps. Consistent with existing parse_history_file() code but not timezone-safe. Not a regression.

Factory directory encoding does not use double-hyphen escaping for literal hyphens (unlike Claude Code). derive_project() applies the same decoding to both, producing incorrect project paths for Factory sessions with literal hyphens (e.g., /home/matthewmurray/claude-memory → /home/matthewmurray/claude/memory). No cross-tool confusion currently since no Claude Code projects overlap.
Session ID from header records (session_start/session_meta) would be None if file is resumed from non-zero offset. No practical impact since session files are written once and don't grow.

appliedUpdates.description: Updated ingestion-formats.md to correct Factory directory encoding documentation. Factory does NOT use double-hyphen escaping for literal hyphens — all hyphens are path separators. Added note about derive_project() implications.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify the 'Do NOT modify existing parser functions' constraint in mission AGENTS.md. The schema-migration feature required adding source_tool field to all 3 existing parsers, which the worker correctly prioritized over the off-limits boundary. The constraint should be refined to: 'Do not change the behavioral logic of existing parsers — additive field additions (e.g., source_tool) are permitted when required by the feature spec.'
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Mission AGENTS.md 'Off-limits code' section said not to modify parse_history_file, parse_project_jsonl, parse_interaction_jsonl. Feature spec required adding source_tool='claude_code' to all parser record dicts. Worker correctly followed the feature spec. The constraint was too broad.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add a note to the ingest-worker skill that for schema-migration-only features, direct SQL verification (PRAGMA table_info, SELECT COUNT) is sufficient — running 'python src/ingest.py --full' against real data is unnecessary and slow for migration-only changes.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Worker's skillFeedback.suggestedChanges for schema-migration-source-tool: 'for the schema-migration-only feature this is unnecessary — direct SQL verification on the DB is more appropriate and faster.'

rejectedObservations.observation: Factory directory encoding skill feedback (from factory-and-codex-parsers review) — duplicate of the library documentation accuracy issue
rejectedObservations.reason: duplicate — addressed by the applied library update to ingestion-formats.md
